brand-title: Where trust begins… and quality is made.
hero_desc:
We are a company specialized in developing health-supporting solutions, working with a clear vision that brings together science, precision, and commitment to the highest standards of quality.
We believe that caring for health is not a temporary choice, but a comprehensive approach built on innovation, reliability, and genuine care for people.

We are committed to delivering carefully designed solutions that keep pace with modern life and support balance and quality at every stage.
Everything we offer reflects our passion for details, our respect for science, and our dedication to building lasting trust.

We don't just offer products…
We set a higher standard in health care.
about_desc: VERA CARE is a company dedicated to developing innovative health-supporting solutions. We are driven by a clear vision that combines science, precision, and a commitment to the highest standards of quality. Our mission is to provide carefully designed products that support health and well-being in every stage of life.
product_1_desc: Balanced Daily Nutrition in One Product. Advanced chewable formula containing Omega-3 with multiple vitamins and minerals to support daily nutritional needs
product_1_full:
One Tablet. Complete Vitamin & Mineral Support.
Enriched with Omega-3 fatty acids for daily wellness.
Supports heart, brain, and immune health.
Promotes healthy hair, skin, and nails.
Designed to help maintain energy and overall vitality.
product_2_name: Targeted Daily Nutrition for Men & Women
product_2_desc: Advanced Chewable Formula with Vitamins, Minerals, Inositols & Antioxidants
product_2_full: Advanced Fertility Support Formula. Myo-Inositol (1100 mg): Improves ovulation and egg quality, especially in PCOS. Improves sperm motility and metabolic function. D-Chiro Inositol (50 mg): Enhances insulin signaling & supports ovarian function and sperm quality. N-Acetyl Cysteine (100 mg): Supports ovulation and reduces oxidative stress. Improves sperm motility, count, and quality.
product_2_ingredients_desc: Specially formulated for reproductive health and fertility support in both men and women. Myo-Inositol (1100mg) regulates metabolic processes and improves ovulation quality, particularly beneficial for PCOS. D-Chiro Inositol (50mg) enhances insulin sensitivity and hormonal balance for optimal reproductive function. N-Acetyl Cysteine (100mg) is a powerful antioxidant that reduces oxidative stress and supports egg and sperm quality. Combined with essential vitamins and minerals including folate, vitamin B12, vitamin D, and zinc, this formula creates a comprehensive nutritional foundation for fertility and reproductive wellness.
product_1_ingredients_desc: Each tablet contains a powerful blend of premium ingredients scientifically formulated to support complete wellness. Omega-3 (500mg) provides essential fatty acids for brain, heart, and joint health. A complete B-Complex ensures optimal energy metabolism and mental focus. Biotin strengthens hair and nails while supporting skin elasticity. Vitamin C and E work as powerful antioxidants to protect against cellular damage. Zinc and selenium boost immune function and reduce inflammation. Magnesium supports muscle relaxation and stress relief. Vitamin D3 enhances calcium absorption for strong bones. This comprehensive formula delivers 36+ essential nutrients in one convenient daily dose.
